display_text: Spider Legs, Tier 5: Neutral item granting Spider active ability. For 10 seconds, grants 20% bonus movement speed, 50% turn rate improvement, free pathing through trees and terrain, and destroys trees walked over. Provides extreme mobility and unconventional pathing for initiation, escape, or chase. Stats: CD: 20s, Duration: 10s.
